1: And And the lily of the valleys.
2: So is is my love among the daughters.
3: And his fruit was was sweet to my taste.
4: And his banner over me was was love.
5: For I am am sick of love.
6: And his right hand doth embrace me.
11: The rain is over and and gone;
14: And thy countenance is is comely.
15: For our vines have have tender grapes.
